name: Ruined Portal Overhaul
description:
Ruined Portal Overhaul transforms every overworld ruined portal encounter into a Procedural Portal Dungeon: a radius-136 corrupted scar with three deterministic structure variants, a protected pit hub, worm-carved caves, lava runs, ritual pedestals, red-storm atmosphere, frequent loot chests, and direct Nether Conduit rewards.

Approaching the frame awakens the Gold Tribute Raid, a proximity-triggered five-wave encounter with animated GeckoLib Piglin-Illager hybrids, visual texture variants, difficulty/config-scaled wave counts, boss-bar progress, ring-based spawns, custom sounds, red thunder, advancement progression, rare Nether Star drops, and post-raid spawn suppression.

Victory lights the portal, spawns the boss chest, and summons the Exiled Piglin Trader for a short-lived gold shop. Endgame progression continues through the Ghast Tear Necklace, Nether Conduit upgrades, Nether Crystal ritual, and overworld Nether Dragon boss with an enraged phase-two fight. Optional ModMenu/Cloth Config and REI integrations keep the modpack experience tunable and discoverable without making those mods hard requirements.
